criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. No topic-specific weight adjustment or priority note is stated in the available call extract sources. Weighting must be verified against the Tier 2A evaluation form schema for the RIA instrument.
criteria.assumption_note: Excellence is a standard evaluation criterion for all Horizon Europe RIA actions. It is not explicitly named with a weighting in the topic text or call extract. The source_section reference points to the scope field, which implies technical and scientific excellence requirements but does not specify evaluation weighting. Criterion label, weight, and thresholds must be confirmed against Tier 2A RIA evaluation form schemas.

criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. The topic explicitly requires contribution to the Apply AI Strategy and ADRA European Partnership, which may constitute call-specific impact evaluation priorities. No explicit numeric weight stated in source documents.
criteria.assumption_note: Impact is a standard evaluation criterion for Horizon Europe RIA actions. Weighting is not explicitly stated in the topic text. The topic's mandatory alignment with the Apply AI Strategy and ADRA partnership (confirmed in sources) is likely to constitute a call-specific impact priority, but no numeric weight or threshold is stated. Confirm criterion weight and thresholds against Tier 2A RIA evaluation form schemas.

criteria.priority_notes: Standard Horizon Europe RIA evaluation criterion. No topic-specific weight adjustment is stated in the available sources. Weighting must be verified against Tier 2A evaluation form schema for the RIA instrument.
criteria.assumption_note: Quality and Efficiency of Implementation is a standard evaluation criterion for Horizon Europe RIA actions. It is not explicitly named or weighted in the topic text or call extract. The scope section references KPIs, benchmarking, and progress monitoring requirements which are relevant to this criterion but do not constitute an evaluation weighting statement. Confirm against Tier 2A RIA evaluation form schemas.

criteria.priority_notes: Grants will be awarded to applications not only in order of ranking, but also to at least one proposal focusing on each of three sectors: healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving. This applies subject to proposals passing all evaluation thresholds. This is a special selection procedure provision, not a separate scored criterion.
